issue_title: [BUG] Finder dialog doesn't show on macOS 13 Ventura beta
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
Unfortunately, I can't give much information on this since it didn't happen to me but the project manager of a client project I am working on. I thought it would be a good idea to already put this report out there anyways to be able to fix this before macOS 13 is officially rel
test_description_zh: 在页面上找到使用 react-dropzone 的文件上传区域，点击该区域（或点击触发文件选择的按钮），观察是否能正常弹出系统文件选择对话框（Finder/文件资源管理器）。
expected_result_zh: 点击文件上传区域后，系统文件选择对话框应正常弹出，用户可以浏览并选择文件进行上传。
